description: Prediction market competitor tracking. Updated on each RESEARCH scan.

entities.name: Polymarket

metrics.note_2026_03_29: Kalshi overtook Polymarket on weekly volume this week ($3.4B Kalshi vs $2.5B Polymarket). First time Polymarket has been #2 on weekly volume.

recent_developments.event: Taker fee expansion to 8 new categories (finance, politics, culture). Projecting $800K-$1M daily revenue.
Acquired Brahma (DeFi settlement infra, $1B+ tx processed). Phasing out existing products in 30 days.
Acquired Dome (cross-platform prediction market API, YC Fall 2025, $5.2M raised). Now Polymarket-exclusive.

entities.competitive_position: dominant, 46% monthly volume share ($10.15B/$22B combined March 2026 ATH). Moving aggressively on monetization and institutional integration. BANNED in Portugal (Jan 2026) and Hungary. Nuclear detonation market removed in March 2026 under pressure. Publicly feuding with Kalshi (attack ads, April 2026). Paradigm VC building prediction market terminal will use Polymarket data as primary feed. 768,476 unique users in March 2026 (up 14.4% MoM). 50M+ combined users with Kalshi cited April 2026.
entities.threat_to_lever: Primary oracle source. If Polymarket delists categories under DEATH BETS Act or CFTC pressure, LEVER loses price feeds for those markets.
entities.opportunity_for_lever: Taker fee expansion makes Polymarket more expensive. Fee-sensitive traders may migrate to lower-cost platforms.

entities.name: Kalshi

recent_developments.event: Kinetic Markets LLC (Kalshi affiliate) registered by NFA as FCM, enabling margin trading for institutional clients. Still needs CFTC rulebook approval.
Washington state sued Kalshi alleging illegal gambling.
ARK Invest partnership: integrates Kalshi data for portfolio hedging and risk management workflows.
Valuation jumped from $11B to $22B on $1B+ Series E (Sequoia, CapitalG, ARK Venture Fund).
Arizona AG filed criminal charges for illegal gambling (first-ever criminal charges against a prediction market).

entities.competitive_position: TradFi-native, CFTC-regulated, moving into margin trading for institutions. Valuation at $22B signals winner-take-most positioning in TradFi prediction markets. FACING: Nevada TRO (sports/elections/entertainment blocked), Washington state lawsuit, Arizona criminal charges (March 17). Responding by blocking politicians/athletes from trading their own markets.
entities.threat_to_lever: Kalshi offering institutional leverage on prediction markets validates the market, but competes for institutional LP capital. Their Kinetic Markets FCM model is different from DeFi-native leverage.
entities.opportunity_for_lever: LEVER is DeFi-native, permissionless, 24/7, 50x leverage vs Kalshi's margin collateral model. Different user segments (DeFi natives vs TradFi institutions). Fundraising narrative: LEVER is what Kalshi is for DeFi.

entities.name: Azuro

recent_developments.event: Unified LiquidityTree pool reducing fragmentation across markets. Top Polygon revenue protocol.

entities.competitive_position: infrastructure layer, not a direct consumer platform
entities.opportunity_for_lever: infrastructure integration if Azuro adds LEVER as a leverage layer

entities.name: OmenX
entities.status: public testnet live (March 30, 2026). Still testnet as of April 4, 2026. No mainnet date announced.

metrics.investors: Paramita VC, Penrose Ventures, M77 Ventures, CEX founders

recent_developments.event: Announced angel funding round and simultaneous public testnet launch. Targeting Base mainnet. Uses perpetual-style mechanics. Claims 'industry-first leveraged prediction market' (false - LEVER exists).

entities.competitive_position: DIRECT LEVER COMPETITOR. Testnet live March 30 on Base (same chain as LEVER). Perpetual-style mechanics with leverage. Funded. Press narrative claims first mover.
entities.threat_to_lever: HIGH. Three funded leveraged prediction market protocols now targeting Base (LEVER, Ultramarkets, OmenX). First to mainnet gains narrative advantage.
entities.opportunity_for_lever: LEVER has superior architecture (ERC-4626, continuous risk curves, deterministic fee split, 50x). OmenX is testnet-only vs LEVER's more mature codebase. Counter the 'industry-first' claim publicly.

entities.name: Ultramarkets

recent_developments.event: CONFIRMED LIVE at app.ultramarkets.xyz. 900+ Polymarket traders on platform. App fully functional. Previously assessed as pre-launch. Status updated to live.

entities.competitive_position: DIRECT LEVER COMPETITOR. LIVE with 900+ users as of March 30, 2026. Positioning as margin layer for Polymarket. 10x max leverage, auto-close at resolution.
entities.threat_to_lever: HIGH (upgraded from medium - now confirmed live with traction)
entities.opportunity_for_lever: LEVER has superior architecture (50x, ERC-4626, continuous risk curves, deterministic fee split). Need to get to market before Ultramarkets gains traction.

entities.name: Limitless Exchange
entities.competitive_position: Largest prediction market on Base (same chain as LEVER). Short-term binary options, not leveraged positions.
entities.threat_to_lever: Adjacent. If they add leverage, becomes direct competitor. Coinbase Ventures backing is significant.
entities.opportunity_for_lever: Potential oracle source or integration target. LEVER could offer leveraged positions on Limitless markets.

entities.name: Opinion
entities.competitive_position: Primary BNB Chain prediction market. Points system model. YZi Labs (Binance) backed.
entities.threat_to_lever: XMarket competitor on BNB Chain. Much larger volume. YZi Labs backing gives ecosystem advantages.
entities.opportunity_for_lever: XMarket's creator revenue share (50%) and CLOB model differentiates from Opinion's points model.

entities.name: DraftKings Predictions

recent_developments.event: Confirmed scaling as part of a 'super app' combining sports betting, prediction markets, and casino in all 50 states. CEO Jason Robins presented super app roadmap at investor day March 2.

entities.competitive_position: TradFi-native, sportsbook-first entering prediction markets with 10M+ existing user base. Targeting same casual user as Kalshi/Polymarket but with sports-betting brand recognition. NOT DeFi-native.
entities.threat_to_lever: low direct. Different user segment (sportsbook users vs DeFi natives). But competes with Kalshi/Polymarket for casual users, which could reduce their growth and create more space for DeFi-native alternatives.
entities.opportunity_for_lever: Validates the sector. If DraftKings users want leverage on prediction outcomes, LEVER's DeFi-native leverage primitive is the answer the centralized platforms cannot provide.

entities.name: Paradigm (trading terminal)

metrics.project_type: Bloomberg-style trading terminal + market-making desk + prediction market index

recent_developments.event: Fortune exclusive: Paradigm building pro-grade prediction market trading terminal for institutional traders. Also building internal market-making business and an S&P 500-style prediction market index.

entities.competitive_position: VC becoming infrastructure operator. Terminal will route liquidity across Polymarket, Kalshi, and on-chain platforms. Index product would create passive exposure vehicles.
entities.threat_to_lever: medium. If Paradigm's terminal routes liquidity, they control the institutional distribution layer. LEVER needs to be a supported platform on any Paradigm terminal.
entities.opportunity_for_lever: DIRECT PITCH TARGET. Arjun Balaji is the right contact. LEVER is the DeFi leverage layer that does not yet exist in Paradigm's stack. Reach out before the terminal ships.

entities.name: 5cc Capital

metrics.focus: data tools, liquidity provision, compliance, infrastructure

recent_developments.event: Announced. Backed by Polymarket CEO Shayne Coplan, Kalshi CEO Tarek Mansour, Marc Andreessen (via Moneta Luna), Ribbit Capital's Micky Malka, Millennium Management PM.

entities.competitive_position: First dedicated prediction market VC fund. Infrastructure focus.
entities.threat_to_lever: Will fund competitors in prediction market infrastructure space.
entities.opportunity_for_lever: DIRECT INVESTOR PITCH TARGET. LEVER is infrastructure, exactly what 5cc Capital backs. Reach out to Adhi Rajaprabhakaran and Noah Zingler-Sternig.
